title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Ismail Axa Ltd
body: "Application number 5438  Applicant AXA objected to the name used by Ismail Axa Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 26 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Ismail Axa Ltd is changed to 16419722 Ltd. "
